narrative:
Pandora-Gilboa Local Sd (Putnam) school district has 2,408 registered voters, with 45.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.9 percentage points.
